inputs.label: Driver Pulley Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the driving pulley, typically between 50 and 500 mm. Influences belt speed and tension.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the driving pulley, typically between 50 and 500 mm. Influences belt speed and tension.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik kasnağının çapı, genellikle 50 ile 500 mm arasındadır. Kayış hızını ve gerginliğini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der Antriebsscheibe, typischerweise zwischen 50 und 500 mm. Beeinflusst Riemengeschwindigkeit und -spannung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la poulie motrice, généralement entre 50 et 500 mm. Influence la vitesse et la tension de la courroie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la polea motriz, típicamente entre 50 y 500 mm. Influye en la velocidad y tensión de la correa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطر بكرة القيادة، عادة بين 50 و 500 مم. يؤثر على سرعة الحزام وشدّه.

inputs.label: Driven Pulley Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the driven pulley, which determines the speed reduction or increase ratio relative to the driver.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the driven pulley, which determines the speed reduction or increase ratio relative to the driver.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik edilen kasnağın çapı, sürücüye göre hız düşürme veya artırma oranını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der Abtriebsscheibe, der das Übersetzungsverhältnis zur Antriebsscheibe bestimmt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la poulie menée, qui détermine le rapport de réduction ou d'augmentation de vitesse par rapport à la motrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la polea conducida, que determina la relación de reducción o aumento de velocidad respecto a la motriz.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطر البكرة المُدارة، الذي يحدد نسبة تقليل أو زيادة السرعة مقارنة ببكرة القيادة.

inputs.label: Center Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance between the centers of the two pulleys. Affects belt length and wrap angle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between the centers of the two pulleys. Affects belt length and wrap angle.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İki kasnak merkezi arasındaki mesafe. Kayış uzunluğunu ve sarım açısını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen den Mittelpunkten der beiden Riemenscheiben. Beeinflusst Riemenlänge und Umschlingungswinkel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre les centres des deux poulies. Affecte la longueur de la courroie et l'angle d'enroulement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre los centros de las dos poleas. Afecta la longitud de la correa y el ángulo de contacto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة بين مركزي البكرتين. تؤثر على طول الحزام وزاوية الالتفاف.

inputs.label: Driver RPM
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the driving pulley in revolutions per minute. Standard motor speeds are 1500 or 1800 RPM.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rotational speed of the driving pulley in revolutions per minute. Standard motor speeds are 1500 or 1800 RPM.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik kasnağının dakikadaki devir sayısı. Standart motor hızları 1500 veya 1800 RPM'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rotationsgeschwindigkeit der Antriebsscheibe in Umdrehungen pro Minute. Übliche Motordrehzahlen sind 1500 oder 1800 U/min.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de rotation de la poulie motrice en tours par minute. Les vitesses moteur standard sont 1500 ou 1800 tr/min.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de rotación de la polea motriz en revoluciones por minuto. Las velocidades estándar del motor son 1500 o 1800 RPM.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السرعة الدورانية لبكرة القيادة بعدد الدورات في الدقيقة. السرعات القياسية للمحرك هي 1500 أو 1800 دورة في الدقيقة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
